'''Liekas Tendo''' was a [[Morath]] [[Mining/Legends|mining]] [[Engineer/Legends|engineer]] hostage. Tendo was taken by the [[Yevetha]] during the attack. Along with the other hostages taken during the [[Yevethan Purge]], Tendo was forced to record a message begging the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] not to fire on Yevethan [[Starship/Legends|ships]] carrying [[Prisoner/Legends|prisoners]]. The Yevetha played the messages during the [[Battle of Doornik-319]], causing hesitation from the New Republic ships and forcing them to withdraw. Later it was learned by [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], that Tendo and all the other captives of the Yevetha had escaped thanks to the [[Fallanassi/Legends|Fallanassi]] [[Enara]] and the ''[[Star Morning]]''.
